Bull Hit is an absolute blast! Seriously, it’s like being back in the schoolyard with your friends—total mayhem, laughs, and non-stop fun. It’s wild, unpredictable, and just straight-up addictive. If you’re looking for a game to let loose, mess around, and have a good time, this is it. Can’t recommend it enough!
this game is so cool i got all the cosmetics
I

reviews.review_title: Total chaos — in the best way
reviews.review_description:
This game is pure fun. You ride an absolutely adorable little bull and go around charging NPCs like it’s the running of the bulls — and yes, it’s just as hilarious as it sounds.

The bull controls are super fun and let you pull off all kinds of wild stuff. You never know what’s going to happen, and that makes every moment unpredictable and hilarious.

There are loads of surprises and hidden easter eggs, and since it’s online, you can do whatever you want with your friends: races, chases, silly challenges… The best part? You get to invent your own games with your own rules — like when you meet up with friends just to have fun and play however you feel like.

The cartoon art style is awesome, colorful, and full of personality. And the sound effects? Absolutely hilarious. Every moo or crash had me cracking up.

Totally recommended if you’re looking for laughs and a good time with friends.

I logged in to play, came out of a tunnel, and some guy showed up flying on a bull and crapped on me like a pigeon.

I’ve been sitting on top of the tunnel for an hour doing it to everyone who comes in.

GOTY 10/10

Truly a life-changing experience.

Bullhit is absolutely wild, in the best possible way hahaha. It's nonstop laughs and chaos (and poop lol). The physics are hilarious, the freedom is unmatched and every session feels like a new kind of ridiculous adventure. 

Can’t wait to see whats next and can’t recommend it enough if you’re looking for pure, unhinged VR fun

Bull Hit is hands down one of the most unexpectedly fun and hilarious experiences I’ve had in VR! The gameplay is super intuitive — you just throw, hit, and dodge, but somehow it turns into this chaotic, laugh-out-loud challenge that’s both satisfying and weirdly addictive.

The art style is quirky in the best way, and the whole vibe doesn't take itself too seriously, which makes it perfect for casual gaming sessions with friends or just blowing off steam after a long day. I went in not knowing what to expect and ended up grinning the whole time.

If you're looking for something unique, fast-paced, and genuinely entertaining, give Bull Hit a shot — you won't regret it. 💥💩🐂

So I’ve recently been looking for some fun sandbox vr games and I came across this. And I thought why not it’s free for limited time so I got it. AND LET ME TELL YOU GET THIS GAME NOW ITS SOOO FUN🥳🥳🥳🥳🥳🥳🥳

developer_response.body: Thanks for that wonderful review, we are glad you had fun and we hope you continue having it!

reviews.review_description: so it is good if you want to get anger out but it makes you sick so 4 stars

reviews.review_title: Take a ride in Bull Hit
reviews.review_description: This game is a total surprise. Spontaneous, dynamic, fun, and chaotic. The more players, the better. Drive the bull, race around, let loose and goof off with friends — you won’t regret it. Being free-to-play, it’d be a shame not to try it out. I love how colorful the map is. It’s one of those rare games that doesn’t take itself seriously — and that’s exactly why it works so well. Pure, ridiculous joy. See you in the gymkhana 😎

reviews.review_title: Pure VR Madness — and I Love It
reviews.review_description:
Honestly, I had no idea what to expect with Bull Hit, but it completely surprised me. It’s just pure, silly fun in the best way. I spent like 30 minutes riding a bull into walls, launching fruit at people, and painting a house with no skill while debating with a stranger about the most dangerous fruit. None of it makes sense, but I couldn’t stop laughing.

Multiplayer is wild in a good way — no rules, no pressure, just random fun happening all the time. The voice chat adds a ton to the experience. I met someone who only communicated in cow sounds. 10/10

Once you get the gist of handling the bull, it’s so much fun to ram people around xDDDD

I had a great time completing the gymkana and racing around. Feeding the fruit to other bulls is also hilarious.

Will be coming back to collect more HitCoins, I really want that dinosaur!
I think this is the funniest game I’ve played so far. I went in with some friends of mine and we stayed for 30 min. We couldn’t stop laughing the whole time. Congrats!!!

reviews.review_title: Bull Hit is a wild and creative VR sandb
reviews.review_description:
The colorful art style and open city environment make it a fun place to explore, and the variety of mini-games keeps things fresh. Customization options for both the bull and the rider are a nice touch, adding a layer of personality to the madness.

Multiplayer is unpredictable in the best way, and the voice chat adds to the social, anything-goes vibe. I also found the LIV camera integration super easy to use — perfect for capturing and sharing funny moments.

It’s definitely a game that doesn’t take itself seriously, and that’s part of the charm. If you're looking for something light, silly, and social, Bull Hit delivers.
The game is fun. (Even though I’ve played it for 3 minutes) but I’ve gotten dizzy playing this game. And that’s never happened before when I’ve played vr.￼

developer_response.body: Hi there! We're really sorry for the inconvenience you're experiencing. We're actively working to improve the game, and playing for just 3 minutes might not give you the most reliable experience. We recommend trying it out in shorter sessions and activating the tunnel vision option, which you can find in the plaza lobby. This will help you play for as long as you like without risk.

reviews.review_description:
You’re riding a bull, steering with your hands on its horns, crashing through a town full of props and terrified NPCs. No rules, no goals, just pure emergent chaos. With friends, it’s non-stop laughs as you wreck everything, paint the town with surprises (that you don't want to touch) and come up with your own games using the boards and setups the devs scattered around.

Hilarious, wild, and totally worth it.
The swearing is crazy in the ad but the actual game isnt «—». The «—» has alot of variants and the «—» is fun to throw! overall good also we all know the name is ment to be bull «—» not bull hit.

reviews.review_title: Bull Hit is pure chaotic fun!
reviews.review_description: Hilarious physics, crazy mini-games, and nonstop laughter with friends. The perfect VR sandbox to let loose and enjoy some wild moments. Totally worth it!

One thing id like to ask is if there could potentially be a setting to set the zone of how far you need to put your arms, i got short arms and it hurt to put my arms out so far for so long(not a skill issue) other than that great game

A lot of fun to play with friends.

Bull Hit is incredibly fun and addictive. The gameplay is smooth, the controls are easy to pick up, and every match is packed with action. The graphics and sound fully immerse you, creating a super entertaining VR experience. Highly recommended!

Bull Hit is a wildly fun VR game that’s pure chaotic joy! You ride a bull, controlling it by grabbing and twisting its horns—a brilliant, immersive mechanic. Fling cow pies, oranges, and lemons to splatter everything, creating hilarious multiplayer mayhem. Voice chat keeps the banter flowing, making every match a riot.

From competitive rugby-style games to thrilling gymkhana obstacle courses, the variety keeps things fresh. The in-game shop adds fun customization options. With vibrant visuals and a lively community, Bull Hit is a must-play for anyone seeking a laugh-out-loud, social VR experience. Jump in and unleash the chaos!

reviews.review_title: A lively city of bulls and chaos
reviews.review_description: Pure chaos and wildness, never thought about how riding above a bull doing mischief could be so fun. I really like the city and how you can go around it at high speed with the bull movement mechanics, meeting with people and hanging around various zones and even throwing some parties on the main plaza when many people gather around.
An amazing game, very fun with incredible scenes and very colorful, great job!!👌

Abolute gen of a game! Colorful sandbox, no rules. You can literally poop on your friends! Super easy controls, you can Play basketball even. I did enjoy recording clips for my tiktok with the in-game camera!!

Moooooo! 🐂🤠 

Hilarious and vibrant VR blast, feeling like San Fermín met a flamenco party! 👏💃

Pure fun, pure chaos and pure olé! there was too many people in the server having fun. 🤩
You can throw stuff, pull goofy tricks, and play dress up with your bull. Great for hanging out with friends or strangers, and the rural spanish environment is quite original
